summary: Iter 48 — Verified (1) Customer Success block-based email editor (heading/paragraph/bullets/image/divider), (2) CTA URL absolute/auto-prefix behaviour, (3) Mobile (390x844) + Tablet (768x1024) responsive layouts for portal & public site. Backend: 4/4 pytest passed against /api/clients/{id}/cs-email/save and /draft (blocks, cta_type, cta_label, cta_url all persisted; delete clears them). Frontend desktop: 17/17 checks passed — cs-blank exposes editor without AI, all 5 block-add chips work, heading/paragraph/bullet/image/divider all render correctly in preview iframe with the image URL kept as 'https://picsum.photos/600/300' (not origin-prefixed) and caption included, reorder ↓ and delete × work, finance_updates pre-fills /app/finance and preview href becomes 'https://projexino-hub.preview.emergentagent.com/app/finance' (absolute), custom 'example.com' auto-prefixes to 'https://example.com', external 'https://calendly.com/...' stays unchanged, cta_type='none' renders zero CTA buttons, Save draft persists, Send test fires POST /api/email/send (returned 500 because Gmail not connected on this tenant — graceful toast shown, matches main agent's note). Frontend mobile/tablet: 12/12 checks passed — /login no horizontal scroll at 390w, /app/digi shows digi-mobile-nav-toggle and hides 220px left rail at <md, toggle reveals a 9-item 2-col grid, tapping an item closes the drawer; public / hamburger present and no overflow; at 768x1024 desktop left rail returns and mobile toggle is hidden.

minor.issue: Returns 500 when Gmail is not connected on the tenant — toast surfaces 'Request failed with status code 500'. Expected behaviour per main agent (graceful error), but the message string could be made more user-friendly (e.g. 'Connect Gmail in Settings to send test emails').

issues: The 'Closing' field is duplicated — rendered once in the greeting/closing 2-col grid AND again below the BlockEditor (lines 762 and 772 in ClientsHub.jsx). Both bind to draft.closing so they stay in sync, but it is confusing UI — consider removing the second one.

tested_features.cs_blank_button: PASS — cs-blank populates default draft (subject/greeting/closing) and exposes the editor pane without an AI call.
tested_features.block_editor_add_chips: PASS — cs-add-block-{heading|paragraph|bullets|image|divider} each appends a new card to cs-blocks.
tested_features.block_editor_heading:
PASS — typing into cs-block-heading-{idx} renders

text

in preview iframe.
tested_features.block_editor_bullets:
PASS — cs-block-bullet-add-{idx} adds a new bullet input; preview contains
  • ...
  • ...
with both items.
tested_features.block_editor_image_url: PASS — cs-block-image-url-{idx} preview contains 'src="https://picsum.photos/600/300"' (kept as-is, NOT origin-prefixed) and the caption text.
tested_features.block_editor_image_upload_testid: PASS — cs-block-image-upload-{idx} input[type=file] is present inside the empty-image block (not exercised with set_input_files but DOM-confirmed).
tested_features.block_editor_reorder: PASS — ↓ on first block (heading) swaps it with the paragraph below.
tested_features.block_editor_delete: PASS — × removes a block; list updates immediately.
tested_features.block_editor_divider: PASS — divider block renders <hr ...> in preview.
tested_features.cta_finance_absolute: PASS — cta_type=finance_updates pre-fills cs-cta-url='/app/finance'; preview href = 'https://projexino-hub.preview.emergentagent.com/app/finance' (absolute via window.location.origin).
tested_features.cta_custom_auto_prefix: PASS — cta_type=custom + url='example.com' (no scheme) → preview href='https://example.com'.
tested_features.cta_external_unchanged: PASS — 'https://calendly.com/projexino/intro' rendered unchanged in preview href.
tested_features.cta_none_no_button: PASS — cta_type=none renders no <a> CTA button in the iframe srcDoc (verified by absence of the gradient style string).
tested_features.save_draft: PASS — cs-save → 'Draft saved · <timestamp>' badge visible immediately.
tested_features.send_test: GRACEFUL FAIL — cs-test fires POST /api/email/send; tenant Gmail not connected → 500 → toast 'AxiosError: Request failed with status code 500'. Per main-agent note, this is expected.
tested_features.mobile_digi_390: PASS — digi-mobile-nav-toggle visible, left rail hidden, tap → 9-item 2-col grid, tap item → drawer closes, 0px overflow.
tested_features.tablet_768_digi: PASS — desktop left rail aside visible, mobile toggle hidden, 0px overflow.
tested_features.backend_cs_email_save_blocks: PASS — POST /api/clients/{id}/cs-email/save persists blocks[], cta_type, cta_label, cta_url. GET /cs-email/draft returns identical data. DELETE clears it.

action_items: (LOW) Remove the duplicated 'Closing' input at ClientsHub.jsx line 772 — line 762 already renders it. They share the same draft.closing binding so it's not a data bug, just clutter.
(LOW) Improve cs-test/send-email error toast: surface a friendlier message when Gmail is not connected (currently shows raw 'AxiosError: Request failed with status code 500').
critical_code_review_comments: absUrl() at ClientsHub.jsx:505 correctly handles https://, http://, mailto:, tel:, leading-slash (origin-prefix), and otherwise prefixes 'https://'. Edge case to consider: a user pasting 'www.example.com' will also be prefixed to 'https://www.example.com' (good), but 'example.com/path' likewise becomes 'https://example.com/path' (good).
rebuildHtml() correctly skips CTA when ctaOpt.id==='none' OR ctaLabel is empty OR ctaUrl is empty — verified via none-test (no <a> button rendered).

BlockEditor uploads images as data: URLs (FileReader.readAsDataURL) — works for preview and Save (Mongo stores the data URL string), but data URLs over ~100KB will balloon Mongo docs and cause >16MB hits on heavy emails. Consider POSTing to a real /api/uploads/image endpoint instead and storing the public URL.

Backend /api/clients/{id}/cs-email/save accepts payload.get('blocks') without schema validation — a malformed block (e.g. {type:'foo'}) would persist silently. Add a Pydantic model with type Literal['heading','paragraph','bullets','image','divider'] for safety.
The 'Closing' field is rendered twice in CustomerSuccess (lines 762 and 772). Both bind to the same state so behaviour is consistent; remove duplicate.
seed_data_creation: Created a TEST_iter48_<uuid> client via POST /api/clients during backend tests and deleted it in teardown. UI tests reused the existing 'naeema · givinghope' client and left a saved cs-email draft on that client (cta_type=finance_updates, 4 blocks). If you need a clean slate, hit DELETE /api/clients/<naeema-id>/cs-email/draft or open the editor and re-save.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All three iter-48 changes (block editor, absolute CTA URLs, mobile responsiveness) are working end-to-end. Block-editor testids: cs-blank, cs-add-block-{type}, cs-blocks, cs-block-{idx}-{type}, cs-block-heading-{idx}, cs-block-paragraph-{idx}, cs-block-bullet-{idx}-{itemIdx}, cs-block-bullet-add-{idx}, cs-block-image-upload-{idx}, cs-block-image-url-{idx}, cs-block-image-caption-{idx}. CTA testids: cs-cta-type, cs-cta-label, cs-cta-url. Mobile testid: digi-mobile-nav-toggle. Preview iframe selector: page.query_selector('iframe[title="cs-preview"]') then get_attribute('srcdoc'). Email send via /api/email/send returns 500 on this tenant because Gmail is not connected — that's the only flake. Regression: /app/backend/tests/test_iter48_cs_blocks_cta.py covers save+get+custom-cta+delete.
rca_of_issue: No regressions found. The 500 on cs-test is environmental (Gmail OAuth not configured for the admin user on this preview tenant) — not a code bug.
